a11yRisks: The system still relies primarily on CSS-driven theme hierarchy, so future dark-mode expansion should continue to be reviewed with contrast checks when new variants are added.
strengths: The kit now exposes both major Seraph page-specific motifs as reusable primitives: the bestiary specimen plate and the staggered ledger/proof band.
Storybook coverage improved in the same shared runtime paths, so the new surfaces are inspectable outside the composed page previews without breaking example parity.
Code and diff surfaces now carry richer file-level framing while preserving the existing theme-aware and keyboard-safe behavior.
Dark-mode and accessibility-sensitive states remain intact across the touched surfaces, with no new obvious contrast regressions introduced by the refactor.
